headline: BMO Capital Maintains Market Perform on Masco, Raises Price Target to $77
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Ketan Mamtora   maintains Masco (NYSE:MAS) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $75 to $77.

headline: Masco Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Masco (NYSE:MAS) reported first-quarter 2026 results that management said reflected strong execution amid what it repeatedly described as a “highly dynamic” macroeconomic and geopolitical environment.
